title: HUMMBL Claim Set
description: Tier 1 Governance Core: Bridge between QuestionSet and EvidenceSet. Each Claim carries an epistemic quadrant tag. Phase 0 schema seed — draft status, not canon.

epistemic_quadrant.description: Rumsfeld quadrant from uncertainty-map skill. If no UncertaintyMap exists, default to 'unknown-known' (conservative).

evidence_state.description: Per ChatGPT review: 'verified' reserved for direct inspection of concrete artifacts.

assumption_set_ref.description: Co-bridge: every Claim has an AssumptionSet surfacing what's taken for granted (OQ-2).

falsifiability.description: How this claim could be proven false

is_public.description: If true, stricter promotion path applies (OQ-8): independent review + evidence verification + disclosure handling + operator approval.

uncertainty_map_ref.description: Parent UncertaintyMap that generated this ClaimSet. Claims inherit quadrant from parent (OQ-2).

is_public.description: If true, all claims in this set follow the stricter Public Claim Set promotion path (OQ-8).

disclosure_scan_auth_ref.description: Required for public ClaimSets referencing security findings: Disclosure-Producing Scan authorization (OQ-8).
